(13) IntTRSNonPeriodicNontermProof (COMPLETE)
Normalized system to the following form:
f(pc, v5642:0, v5650:0) -> f(1, 4 + v5642:0, 1 + v5650:0) :|: pc = 1 && (v5650:0 > 10 && v5642:0 > 3)
Proved unsatisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is never left after entering:
(((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((1 * 4) + (run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and (((run1_2 * 1)) > ((1 * 10)) and ((run1_1 * 1)) > ((1 * 3))))) and !(((run2_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and (((run2_2 * 1)) > ((1 * 10)) and ((run2_1 * 1)) > ((1 * 3)))))
Proved satisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is entered at least once:
((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((1 * 4) + (run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and (((run1_2 * 1)) > ((1 * 10)) and ((run1_1 * 1)) > ((1 * 3)))))

(21)

(22) IntTRSNonPeriodicNontermProof (COMPLETE)
Normalized system to the following form:
f(pc, v703:0) -> f(1, 4 + v703:0) :|: pc = 1 && v703:0 > 3
Proved unsatisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is never left after entering:
(((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((1 * 4) + (run1_1 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((run1_1 * 1)) > ((1 * 3)))) and !(((run2_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((run2_1 * 1)) > ((1 * 3))))
Proved satisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is entered at least once:
((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((1 * 4) + (run1_1 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((run1_1 * 1)) > ((1 * 3))))

(33) IntTRSNonPeriodicNontermProof (COMPLETE)
Normalized system to the following form:
f(pc, v62:0) -> f(1, 1 + v81:0) :|: pc = 1 && TRUE
Proved unsatisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is never left after entering:
(((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and T)) and !(((run2_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and T))
Proved satisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is entered at least once:
((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and T))
